title: this is where we are
description: Lyrics from this is where we are
body:
https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/03102022-this-is-where-we-are



i got voices in my head
and i know they're my friends
cuz every time i spend time with them
i'm better in the end
i got choices in my face
and i know they're mine to take
cuz every expression i make
leaves an impression on space
i got digits in my hand
bridges that can span
space and time if i maintained
them but i didn't understand in time
now this place is what it is
and it isn't what i planned
in my wildest dreams
i never expected to press beyond the seems
i got miles on my legs
but i don't see my exit yet
so i settle in and step
til there's seed, feed, or sleep i need to get
i got souls on my feet
so when i walk the beat
i don't police
turn my music to meat
cuz we all gotta eat
even in the belly of the beast
i got the world on my back
and i can't let it down
cuz i keep mistaking my faults for the ground
and i don't feel safe enough for folk to build around
i got evil in my heart
and it's tearing me apart
not the being or meaning but only seeing it in the dark
i feel blind in the light waiting for the horror to start
so when you see me in the shadows please believe i'm here to sharpen my art
and when you see me at home, remember battles tend to harden and scar, but i'm here cuz this is where we are
